message:
fix(engine): restrict control_plane::mocks to cfg(test)+pub(crate) scope

The mocks module in control_plane/mod.rs was unconditionally public,
which meant production builds included test-only mock types. Gate it
behind #[cfg(test)] and narrow visibility to pub(crate) so unit tests
within the runtime crate keep a single type identity while the module
is excluded from production surfaces.

Add an integration test that reads the source file and asserts the
module is not exported as `pub mod mocks` — only `pub(crate) mod mocks`
behind cfg(test) is allowed.

Also adds clone/debug test coverage for MockFailureMode::LatencyInjection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
